description: Solden Box panel — XSUAA scopes for read + action on AP items inside the SAP Fiori extension

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.User
scopes.description: Read access to the Box panel (state, timeline, exceptions)

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Approver
scopes.description: Approve / reject ERP-native AP items from inside the Fiori panel

role-templates.name: BoxPanelUser
role-templates.description: View the Solden Box for any supplier invoice in the user's company codes

role-templates.name: BoxPanelApprover
role-templates.description: Approve or reject ERP-native bills from the Box panel

role-collections.name: Solden Box Panel — Reader
role-collections.description: Assign to AP team members who need read access to the panel

role-collections.name: Solden Box Panel — Approver
role-collections.description: Assign to designated approvers (per-amount routing also applies in Slack)
